series_metadata.series_description: Routine inspections of licensed facilities, conducted prior to rollout of Matrix Inspector.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Retain in agency until scanned, unless 3 years after a lapse, failed to renew or discontinuation of business then shred. ; Electronic: Electronic: Retain on server for 3 years after lapse, failed to renew or discontinuation of business then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
